chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Income Tax Appeal (“ITA)” No. 327 / 2000 aw/ ITA No. 482 & 357 / 2000 & ITC No. 12 / 2002 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of case. 28.02.2023. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Aminuddin Ansari, Advocate for Respondent. Ms. Maryam Habib, Commissioner Inland Revenue. ___________________ Pursuant to our last order, Counsel is in attendance along with Ms. Maryam Habib, Commissioner Inland Revenue and Counsel under instructions does not press Income Tax Appeals No. 327, 482 & 357 of 2000 and Income Tax Case No. 12 of 2002. Accordingly, all these cases are dismissed as not pressed. Office to place copy in connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
